## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration on an AI-powered programmatic SEO campaign and content creation workflows using Anthropic's AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital has developed AI-powered workflows for content creation, optimization, and publishing that have shown promising early results for clients](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Strappy is interested in running a campaign showcasing these capabilities around September/October, with a potential webinar in mid-September](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Initial budget is $9k for 2 months to validate the approach, with potential for longer-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Key workflows discussed include meta description generation, SEO optimization, integration page creation, and technical content outlines](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's AI Content Approach

  - [Combines strategy and dedicated execution resources to produce high-quality AI-generated content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Starts with manual processes to get fast results, then automates over time](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Uses prompting techniques to instill brand voice, target audience intent, and product tie-ins](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Leverages air table as a "Content OS" to manage and refresh large content operations](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Showing promising early ranking gains for clients like Homebase, Firework, DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### Potential Workflows for Strappy

  - [Automating meta description creation in batches](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [SEO optimization through internal linking and structure refactoring](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Creating integration info pages for services/plugins and targeting relevant keywords](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Generating technical content outlines from existing videos for human writers to expand](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SOW with engagement details and onboarding timeline](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Target late August to kick off engagement](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Plan for a mid-September webinar showcasing initial results](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Marcel to sync with Anthropic on accelerating the integration](https://fathom.video/share/PSBfBNYarrCGgUqsyQRPEy3H6ecy7hYB?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
